title: trachelospermum fragrans
intro: Trachelospermum fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Jasmine Vine, is a woody, evergreen climber native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Trachelospermum fragrans include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
